category_sources: source_facts.description says "Cryptographic & SSL/TLS library"; official Mbed TLS docs describe cryptographic primitives, X.509, SSL/TLS, and DTLS.
display_name_sources: Official documentation hub and GitHub README use "Mbed TLS"; source_facts.name is mbedtls.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says main documentation is on ReadTheDocs; ReadTheDocs hub provides Getting Started and API Reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Mbed-TLS/mbedtls; per instructions repo is returned as null when already supplied.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies cryptographic SSL/TLS library; official docs list cryptographic primitives, X.509, SSL/TLS, DTLS, and PSA Cryptography API.
